description: 썰툰 기본 캐릭터 바이블. 1인칭 화자 + 주변 인물 구성.

mainCharacter.promptBase: a {gender} young Korean adult, {hair_style}, wearing {outfit}, webtoon style character, expressive face, {expression}

supportingCharacters.description: 조연 캐릭터. Job 스크립트에서 역할 확정 후 추가.

identity.role: 역할 (예: 직장 상사, 친구, 낯선 사람)

expressionLibrary.shock: eyes wide open, mouth agape, sweat drops
expressionLibrary.angry: furrowed brows, gritted teeth, red face marks
expressionLibrary.happy: big smile, sparkling eyes, rosy cheeks
expressionLibrary.embarrassed: blushing, nervous smile, hand behind head
expressionLibrary.suspicious: one eyebrow raised, narrowed eyes, crossed arms
expressionLibrary.crying: tears streaming, quivering lip, closed eyes
expressionLibrary.surprised_positive: starry eyes, open mouth, raised eyebrows

panelCompositionRules: 훅 씬: close-up on face, strong expression
배경 설명 씬: wide establishing shot with character small in frame
갈등 씬: medium shot, dynamic pose, speed lines optional
반전 씬: extreme close-up on eyes, or dramatic pull-back wide shot
해소 씬: medium warm shot, relaxed body language
CTA 씬: character facing camera, fourth-wall break friendly pose
